div1.entryFree: Tharsus (M. Edd. mostly Tarsus) name of a town (Tarsus in Cilicia?): Per. I, 2, 115. I, 4, 21. I, 4, 21 II Prol. 11 etc. Changed to Thasos or Thassos by M. Edd. in Caes. V, 3, 104, more in congruity, perhaps, with history than with the principles of textual criticism. It seems too probable that Sh. took Tarsus and Thasos for the same.
